address: Venneit Close, Roger Dudman Way, Oxford
pros: Excellent public transport access: Oxford Railway Station just 460m away (5-minute walk)
Multiple bus stops nearby: Osney Island (545m) and Gloucester Green (770m)
Good selection of restaurants within walking distance: The Four Candles (822m), The White Rabbit (859m), and Malmaison Oxford (919m)
Close to major shopping centers: Westgate Oxford (1.1km), Meadowside Retail Park (1.1km), and Botley Road Retail Park (1.1km)
Healthcare facilities nearby: Jericho Health Centre (551m) and Northgate Health Centre (1.1km)
Educational institutions accessible: Activate Learning (991m), Dragon School (1.6km), and University of Oxford Examination Schools (1.6km)
Access to green spaces: The University Parks (1.4km) and Grandpont Nature Park (1.4km)
cons: Major hospitals are distant: Churchill Hospital (4.0km), John Radcliffe Hospital (3.6km), and Nuffield Orthopaedic Centre (4.4km)
Parks require a walk: Nearest parks The University Parks (1.4km) and Grandpont Nature Park (1.4km) are not within immediate walking distance
Limited immediate green space: Closest significant park is over 1.3km away
